description: This source file defines an API endpoint for listing audit logs. It uses FastAPI for routing and SQLAlchemy for database interactions, specifically to retrieve and return audit log entries in reverse chronological order with pagination.

methods.name: list[dict] list_audit_logs( limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0, _admin: AppUser = Depends(require_admin), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Asynchronous endpoint to list audit logs with pagination, accessible only to admin users.

ctags.signature: ( limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0, _admin: AppUser = Depends(require_admin), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )
